title: Crafters.Stats
description: A simple comand mod that allows you to see player stats and playtime in game, somewhat similar to Crafters.one.Player.Statistics bot and its commands
body:
A simple comand mod that allows you to see player stats and playtime in game, somewhat similar to Crafters.one.Player.Statistics bot and its commands

Command List

----------------------------

/online (shows who is online and for how long)

/pt (gets your total playtime)*

/profile (pulls all your general stats from the [Crafters.API](https://wiki.crafters.one/wiki/API_Usage))*

----------------------------

this mod is for the players of The [Crafters.One](https://discord.gg/SaDKpj7ZZu) minecraft server

* this mod does require you to have an api key for some features to work, if you want to use the features open a ticket in the [Crafters.One](https://discord.gg/SaDKpj7ZZu) discord server

this is what is shown when you dont have a valid api key
![Api Requirement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/845c1ae3a1e3fdafb098edbd79c133566067ca1b.png)

If you havent heard of crafters.one here is the [planet minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/server/randoms-3638078/) listing for the server, and you can join the discord link above
